name: "The secret client"–Rarity
description:
Art is NOT mine❗

After the events at Camp Everfree, Rarity has launched her first business, Rarity's Renegade Stitch, a mobile tailor shop that provides urgent repairs and redesigns for CHS students. However, her perfectionism and high prices have put off potential customers. When Vice Principal Luna threatens to shut down her "unlicensed activities," Rarity panics and hires you (a new CHS student) as a "secret client" for a photo shoot. Her plan is to prove to Luna that her services are indispensable... even if it means re-tailoring your old T-shirt into high fashion.
creator: Kitayama
